The '''Glarsaurs''' were [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Sentience/Legends|sapients]] indigenous to [[Gelgelar/Legends|Gelgelar]]. Brutes by nature, they had curled tails and sharp claws.

{{Species-stub}}
